3.why: We need the size to wire the chain and set the right end.
3.invariant: n is the number of nodes.

4.why: nextp[i] holds the id node i points to.

5.happening: Loop over every node to wire the original chain.
5.why: Each node links to the next in order.

6.happening: Node {i} is not the tail — point it at the next node.
6.invariant: Only the tail ends the list.

6.why: The last node points at nothing.

10.why: It flashes whichever link we just rewired.
10.invariant: changed holds the last rewired node id.

11.why: We weave starting from the front.
11.invariant: left is the next front node to place.

12.why: We weave from the back in parallel.
12.invariant: right is the next back node to place.

13.happening: The ends haven't met — weave another pair.
13.why: We interleave front and back until they converge.
13.invariant: Nodes outside [left, right] are already reordered.

13.happening: left and right have met — the weave is complete.

14.happening: Rewire node {left}'s next to point at the far node {right}.
14.why: The reordered form alternates front, back, front, back…

15.happening: Flash the link that just changed (from node {left}).
15.why: Highlight the rewire for the learner.

16.why: The next front node moves right.

17.happening: left has reached right — only the middle node remains.
17.why: There is no back node left to interleave.
17.invariant: The middle node will end the list.

17.happening: left and right are still apart — keep weaving.
17.why: There is still a back node to place.

19.happening: Rewire node {right}'s next to point back at the new left {left}.
19.why: After the far node comes the next front node.

20.happening: Flash the link that just changed (from node {right}).

21.why: The next back node moves left.

22.happening: Cap node {left} so the reordered list ends there.
22.why: The middle node is the new tail.

24.happening: Start an empty list to read out the result.
24.why: We traverse the rewired chain to produce the answer.
24.invariant: order will hold the reordered values.

25.happening: Begin the read-out at the head.
25.why: The reordered list starts at node 0.

26.happening: Still nodes to read — continue the traversal.
26.why: We collect every value in the new order.
26.invariant: order holds the values read so far.

26.happening: Reached the end of the reordered list.
26.why: cur has fallen off the end.
26.invariant: order is the full reordered sequence.

27.why: It's the next value in the reordered list.

28.why: Move to the next node in the new order.
28.invariant: cur advances along the reordered chain.

29.why: The list has been fully reordered and read out.

init.happening: Wiring the original chain and placing left at the head, right at the tail.
init.why: We need the chain and both ends before weaving.
init.invariant: left starts at the head, right at the tail.

loop.happening: Weaving the list — or reading out the result.
loop.why: Interleave front and back until the ends meet, then traverse.

check.happening: Checking whether left has caught up to right.
check.why: When they meet, only the middle node remains.

update.happening: Rewiring a next pointer (and flashing it) or collecting a value.
update.why: Each rewire places the next node in the reordered form.

move.happening: Advancing left inward, right inward, or the read-out cursor.
move.why: The ends close in; the cursor walks the result.

return.why: The weave and read-out are done.
